[birthday-party.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26986651/birthday-party.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="he" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>🎂 יום הולדת מורי ואבי</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Rubik:wght@400;700;900&family=Pacifico&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{font-family:'Rubik',sans-serif;color:#fff;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;}

.bg-photo{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/jpeg;base64,");
  background-size:cover;background-position:center top;
  filter:brightness(0.28) saturate(1.6);
}
.bg-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 15% 15%, #9333ea66 0%, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 85% 80%, #ec489966 0%, transparent 50%),
    rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
}
.confetti{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:2;overflow:hidden;}
.dot{position:absolute;animation:fall linear infinite;}
@keyframes fall{
  0%{transform:translateY(-20px) rotate(0deg);opacity:.9;}
  100%{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg);opacity:0;}
}
.container{position:relative;z-index:3;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem 1.4rem 4rem;}

@keyframes slideUp{
  from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);}
  to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
}
.anim{opacity:0;animation:slideUp .6s ease forwards;}

  50%{box-shadow:0 4px 50px rgba(236,72,153,.9);transform:scale(1.02);}
}

.hero{text-align:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.emoji-burst{font-size:2.6rem;display:block;margin-bottom:.4rem;animation:bounce 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}
.title-hebrew{
  font-size:2.6rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:.25rem;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#ec4899,#c084fc,#06b6d4);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
}
.title-names{font-size:1rem;color:#f3f4f6;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:.9rem;text-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);}

.dj-block{
  display:inline-block;
  background:rgba(245,158,11,0.18);
  border:2px solid #f59e0bcc;
  border-radius:18px;padding:.65rem 2rem;
  backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
}
.dj-label{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fbbf24aa;margin-bottom:2px;}
.dj-name{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:2.2rem;color:#fbbf24;text-shadow:0 0 30px #f59e0bcc;}

.glass{
  background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  border-radius:20px;
  backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
}

.invite-box{padding:1.4rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;text-align:center;}
.invite-line-main{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:#f3f4f6;line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.9rem;padding-bottom:.9rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}
.invite-line-main strong{color:#fbbf24;}
.invite-lines{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;}
.invite-line{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.95rem;color:#f3f4f6;line-height:1.5;}
.sq{flex-shrink:0;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#ec4899);}

/* COUNTDOWN — גדול וברור */
.countdown-wrap{padding:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;border-radius:20px;}
.countdown-label{text-align:center;font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:#d1d5db;margin-bottom:12px;}
.countdown-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;}
.cd-box{
  background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:.9rem .4rem;
  text-align:center;
  backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
}
.cd-num{
  font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#ec4899);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
  display:block;
}
.cd-unit{font-size:.65rem;color:#d1d5db;margin-top:5px;letter-spacing:.06em;display:block;}

.info-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.info-card{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);border-radius:16px;padding:1rem;text-align:center;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);}
.info-card .icon{font-size:1.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:5px;}
.info-card .lbl{font-size:.63rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#d1d5db;margin-bottom:3px;}
.info-card .val{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.info-card .sub{font-size:.76rem;color:#e5e7eb;margin-top:2px;}

.gift-box{background:rgba(139,92,246,0.28);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.5);border-radius:20px;padding:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;text-align:center;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}
.gift-box h3{font-size:.92rem;color:#c4b5fd;margin-bottom:.6rem;font-weight:700;}
.gift-box p{font-size:.87rem;color:#f3f4f6;line-height:1.7;}

.ticket-title{text-align:center;font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#d1d5db;margin-bottom:10px;}
.ticket-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:12px;padding:.85rem 1.1rem;margin-bottom:8px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}
.ticket-row .type{font-size:.9rem;color:#f3f4f6;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.ticket-row .price{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:900;color:#fbbf24;}
.badge-early{background:rgba(16,185,129,.25);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.5);color:#6ee7b7;font-size:.67rem;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;}

.cta-btn{display:block;width:100%;padding:1.1rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#ec4899);color:#fff;font-family:'Rubik',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;border:none;border-radius:16px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;text-align:center;letter-spacing:.03em;transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;box-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(236,72,153,.5);margin-bottom:10px;}
.cta-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(236,72,153,.6);}
.cta-hint{text-align:center;font-size:.75rem;color:#d1d5db;}
.footer{text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;font-size:.74rem;color:#9ca3af;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="bg-photo"></div>
<div class="bg-overlay"></div>
<div class="confetti" id="confetti"></div>

<div class="container">

  <div class="hero anim" style="animation-delay:.15s">
    <span class="emoji-burst">🎂✨🎉</span>
    <div class="title-hebrew">יום הולדת שמח!</div>
    <div class="title-names">מוריה דינה • אביגיל תהילה</div>
    <div class="dj-block">
      <div class="dj-label">הדיג׳יי של הערב</div>
      <div class="dj-name">DJ ODEYA</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="invite-box glass anim" style="animation-delay:.22s">
    <div class="invite-line-main">
      ואתם <strong>היחידים הסגולים</strong> (אולי)<br>שמוזמנים לפארטי 🎊
    </div>
    <div class="invite-lines">
      <div class="invite-line"><div class="sq"></div><span>🎁 מתנה מעפנה שתצחיק את <strong style="color:#f0abfc">מורי</strong></span></div>
      <div class="invite-line"><div class="sq"></div><span>💚 ברכה שתרגש את <strong style="color:#6ee7b7">אבי</strong> — תהלום את האירוע</span></div>
      <div class="invite-line"><div class="sq"></div><span>🍽️ בואו יפים עם קיבה</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- COUNTDOWN -->
  <div class="countdown-wrap glass anim" style="animation-delay:.3s">
    <div class="countdown-label">⏳ ספירה לאחור לאירוע</div>
    <div class="countdown-grid">
      <div class="cd-box"><span class="cd-num" id="cd-days">00</span><span class="cd-unit">ימים</span></div>
      <div class="cd-box"><span class="cd-num" id="cd-hours">00</span><span class="cd-unit">שעות</span></div>
      <div class="cd-box"><span class="cd-num" id="cd-mins">00</span><span class="cd-unit">דקות</span></div>
      <div class="cd-box"><span class="cd-num" id="cd-secs">00</span><span class="cd-unit">שניות</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="info-grid anim" style="animation-delay:.36s">
    <div class="info-card">
      <span class="icon">📅</span>
      <div class="lbl">תאריך</div>
      <div class="val">1.5.2026</div>
      <div class="sub">יום חמישי</div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-card">
      <span class="icon">⏰</span>
      <div class="lbl">שעה</div>
      <div class="val">11:00</div>
      <div class="sub">בבוקר</div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-card" style="grid-column:1/-1">
      <span class="icon">📍</span>
      <div class="lbl">מיקום</div>
      <div class="val">רימונים</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="gift-box anim" style="animation-delay:.42s">
    <h3>🎁 מה להביא?</h3>
    <p>מתנה מעפנה שתצחיק את <strong style="color:#f0abfc">מורי</strong><br>
    וברכה שתרגש את <strong style="color:#6ee7b7">אבי</strong> 💜</p>
  </div>

  <div class="anim" style="animation-delay:.48s;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    <div class="ticket-title">🎟️ כרטיסים</div>
    <div class="ticket-row">
      <div class="type">🌟 כרטיס מוקדם <span class="badge-early">עכשיו!</span></div>
      <div class="price">₪1</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-row">
      <div class="type">⏳ ביום עצמו</div>
      <div class="price">₪1.5</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="anim" style="animation-delay:.54s">
    <a href="https://links.payboxapp.com/JeFB4vIiy2b" class="cta-btn" target="_blank">
      💳 לרכישת כרטיס — PayBox
    </a>
    <div class="cta-hint">מהרו להזמין — המלאי קיים! 🔥</div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer anim" style="animation-delay:.6s">made with 💜 for Mori & Abi</div>
</div>


<script>
const colors=['#f59e0b','#ec4899','#8b5cf6','#10b981','#3b82f6','#f97316','#06b6d4','#a78bfa'];
const conf=document.getElementById('confetti');
for(let i=0;i<55;i++){
  const d=document.createElement('div');
  d.className='dot';
  const s=Math.random()*9+4;
  d.style.cssText=`width:${s}px;height:${s}px;background:${colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]};left:${Math.random()*100}%;top:${Math.random()*-30}%;animation-duration:${Math.random()*7+5}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*8}s;border-radius:${Math.random()>.5?'50%':'3px'};`;
  conf.appendChild(d);
}

function updateCD(){
  const target=new Date('2026-05-01T11:00:00');
  const now=new Date();
  let diff=target-now;
  if(diff<0){
    document.querySelector('.countdown-wrap').innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:#fbbf24;padding:.5rem">🎉 המסיבה כבר הגיעה! 🎉</div>';
    return;
  }
  const days=Math.floor(diff/86400000);
  const hours=Math.floor((diff%86400000)/3600000);
  const mins=Math.floor((diff%3600000)/60000);
  const secs=Math.floor((diff%60000)/1000);
  document.getElementById('cd-days').textContent=String(days).padStart(2,'0');
  document.getElementById('cd-hours').textContent=String(hours).padStart(2,'0');
  document.getElementById('cd-mins').textContent=String(mins).padStart(2,'0');
  document.getElementById('cd-secs').textContent=String(secs).padStart(2,'0');
}
updateCD();
setInterval(updateCD,1000);
</script>
</body>
</html>
